description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §5.

Work:
- Runtime::spawn(closure) pulls a fresh arena block, initializes Process, deep-copies the closure into the new heap, and enqueues an entry that tail-calls `closure.code(closure, @halt_stub)`.
- Remove Process::next_frame seeding.
- Remove the trampoline-driven entry path for spawned tasks.

Acceptance: §8.4 spawn portion compiles and runs; spawned tasks no longer hold a next_frame field.
title: fz-cps.3: Runtime::spawn rewrite
